LePIC+ 3D
  • Physics Model
  • View page source

Physics Model

LePIC uses the electrostatic Particle-In-Cell (PIC) method.

Main Components

  • Particle pusher

  • Charge deposition

  • Poisson solver

  • Boundary conditions

  • Plasma chemistry

  • Coulomb collisions

  • RF electron heating

Particle Mover

Particles are advanced using the Lorentz force equation.

Poisson Solver

The electrostatic potential is computed from Poisson’s equation:

\[\nabla^2 \phi = -\rho / \epsilon_0\]
